content:
2026 mein LIC mein bahut saare plan hain. 31 varshon ke anubhav ke aadhar par, main top 5 plan bata raha hun.

## 1. LIC Jeevan Amar (Plan 955) — Sabse Achha Term Plan

Sirf parivaar ki suraksha chahiye toh Jeevan Amar sabse behtar hai. ₹1 crore ka cover maat₹7,000-10,000/varsh mein. Sabse zaroori policy — har kamaane wale ke paas honi chahiye.

## 2. LIC Jeevan Labh (Plan 936) — Bachat + Suraksha

Jo log bachat bhi chahte hain, unke liye Jeevan Labh sabse lokpriya plan hai. 16 saal premium, 25 saal tak cover. Maturity par SA + bonus — lagbhag 2x-2.5x rashi milti hai.

## 3. LIC Jeevan Anand (Plan 815) — Whole Life Cover

Jo poori zindagi cover chahte hain, unke liye Jeevan Anand. Maturity ke baad bhi poori umar ₹1 lakh ka life cover bana rahta hai.

## 4. LIC Dhan Sanchay — Guaranteed Returns

Jinhe market ka jokhim nahi chahiye, unke liye Dhan Sanchay perfect hai. Returns pahle se tay — maturity par bilkul wahi milega jo tay hua tha.

## 5. LIC New Children's Money Back (Plan 832) — Bacchon ke liye

Bacche ke 18, 20, 22, 24 varsh par paisa — college fees aur shaadi ke liye bilkul sahi.

## Aapke liye sahi plan kaun sa hai?

| Zaroorat | Best Plan |
|---|---|
| Sirf suraksha | Jeevan Amar |
| Bachat + suraksha | Jeevan Labh |
| Guaranteed return | Dhan Sanchay |
| Bacche ka bhavishya | Money Back 832 |
| Whole life | Jeevan Anand |

Hamare [premium calculator](/calculators/premium) se anumaan lein, ya 9415313434 par Ajay sir se baat karein.
contentHi:
2026 mein LIC ki top 5 policies: (1) Jeevan Amar — term, (2) Jeevan Labh — bachat + suraksha, (3) Jeevan Anand — whole life, (4) Dhan Sanchay — guaranteed returns, (5) Money Back 832 — bacchon ke liye.

9415313434 par call karein.
